description: ADR-598 G13 — full-tree license allowlist (CLAUDE.md N.5). A package passes if its SPDX license is in allowedLicenses (OR-any / AND-all semantics) or it is a vetted exception in allowedPackages. GPL/LGPL/AGPL with no permissive alternative is never auto-baselined. Refresh via `pnpm run license:baseline`.

axe-core.reason: ADR-598 G11 — a11y test engine (via jest-axe). Dev/test-only (never in the production bundle). MPL-2.0 is weak, file-level copyleft: it obliges opening only modified axe-core files, not our code. Approved Giorgio 2026-07-08.

@resvg/resvg-js@2.6.2.reason: Seeded — off-allowlist but non-copyleft; manually vetted permissive/dev-only
